svg.text: CDE Analyzer: Instrument & Phrase Stripping Workflow (with Iterative Refinement)
Phase 2: Full Instrument Pattern Discovery & Stripping
Phase 4: Instrument Family Pattern Discovery & Stripping
Phase 6: Non-Instrument Phrase Pattern Discovery & Stripping
Add patterns to config/supplementary_patterns.yaml → restart full workflow from Phase 1
1. SEQUENCING: Full instrument stripping (Phase 2) must complete BEFORE non-instrument phrase discovery (Phase 5) to avoid cross-contamination
2. INDEPENDENCE: Family pattern curation (Phase 3) is INDEPENDENT - can run in parallel with Phase 2
3. TWO-PHASE STRIPPING: Each strip_discover → strip_phrases pair: flexible regex discovery finds verbatim patterns, then exact string replacement
4. ITERATION POINTS: Phase 1 (instrument) and Phase 5 (phrase) each have iterative loops to improve coverage before proceeding
5. CONFIG-DRIVEN: Supplementary patterns in config/supplementary_patterns.yaml enable iterative improvement without code changes
6. HUMAN REVIEW: Multiple curation points ensure quality control - patterns may need categorization, filtering, or correction
